lessons.title: Section 238 and Substantial Non-Cash Asset Transactions
lessons.description: We are now entering a module that deals with the legislative controls placed on transactions between a company and its directors. In our previous module, we examined the fiduciary duties directors owe to the company.

lessons.title: Section 239 and Loans to Directors
lessons.description: In our last lesson, we examined Section 238 and the controls on substantial non-cash asset transactions.
